description.ko: AQUA-5는 극한의 수압을 견디도록 제작된 특수 탐사 유닛으로, 고요한 심해를 항해하며 자체 생체 발광 코어로 어둠을 밝힙니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a specialized exploration unit built to withstand extreme oceanic pressures, illuminated by its own internal bioluminescent power core as it navigates the silent depths.

prompt: A highly advanced robotic entity named AQUA-5 with sleek translucent plating and glowing cyan bioluminescent circuitry, floating in the dark deep ocean at the midnight zone, surrounded by glowing jellyfish and hydrothermal vents, hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, underwater photography style.
